description: Polish QuantMax app: integrate @quant/brand, add Framer Motion spring-physics animations to SwipeCard/VideoFeed, dark mode, responsive layout, loading/empty/error states, staggered list entrances, haptic-style microinteractions.
steps: Update apps/quantmax/src/pages/globals.css: Add complete brand CSS variables using the same pattern as quantai (brand colors, surfaces, motion, typography). Add dark mode vars under .dark class. Add responsive breakpoint variables 360-1440px.
Update apps/quantmax/tailwind.config.ts: Extend theme with brand colors from CSS vars, add dark mode class strategy, add brand font families, include shared-ui content path.

Update apps/quantmax/src/pages/_app.tsx: Wrap app in a ThemeProvider for dark/light mode. Apply default dark mode class. Import globals.css (already imported). Add motion.div for page transition animations using AnimatePresence.
Create apps/quantmax/src/providers/theme-provider.tsx: Client component managing dark/light preference with localStorage and system preference detection.

Update apps/quantmax/src/pages/index.tsx (ForYouFeedPage): Add Framer Motion animations - video transitions use spring.bouncy for swipe animations, like animation uses motion.div with scale burst. Use brand colors for action buttons (like=semantic.success, nope=semantic.error, superlike=brand-info). Add loading skeleton for initial feed load. Improve responsiveness for landscape orientation.

Update apps/quantmax/src/components/SwipeCard.tsx: Replace CSS transitions with Framer Motion drag gesture and spring.gentle physics. Add animated stamp overlays (LIKE/NOPE) that spring in with bouncy motion. Use brand colors instead of hardcoded colors (green-400 -> brand success, red-400 -> brand error). Add press scale effect on action buttons. Ensure 44px tap targets (already met).

Update apps/quantmax/src/components/VideoFeed.tsx: Add Framer Motion page transitions between videos using spring physics. Add staggered entrance for action overlay items. Add loading skeleton placeholder. Use brand dark surface colors.
Update apps/quantmax/src/components/SwipeStack.tsx: Use AnimatePresence for card stack transitions. Add drag constraint spring physics. Add success/match animation state with brand accent colors.
Update apps/quantmax/src/components/MatchProfile.tsx: Add motion entrance animation (slide up with spring.gentle). Use brand typography and colors. Add skeleton loading state.
Update apps/quantmax/src/pages/matching.tsx: Add Framer Motion staggered card stack entrance. Use brand colors/surfaces. Add empty state when no more profiles with friendly copy.
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/LoadingSkeleton.tsx: Reusable skeleton with brand motion shimmer. Variants: video-feed, swipe-card, match-list.
Update remaining pages (discover.tsx, challenges.tsx, live.tsx, videochat.tsx) with brand colors, motion animations, loading/error/empty states, and dark mode support.
acceptance_criteria: QuantMax uses @quant/brand color tokens and motion springs throughout
Dark mode works with class-based toggle
SwipeCard uses Framer Motion drag gesture with spring physics
Video feed transitions animate with spring-based physics
Loading skeletons appear during data fetches
Empty states show friendly copy and visual
verification: Run pnpm --filter @quant/quantmax typecheck and confirm it passes
findings: All changes compile cleanly with npx tsc --noEmit (only pre-existing @quant/database errors from server-core). Pre-commit prettier hooks ran and reformatted code successfully. ThemeProvider uses localStorage key 'quantmax-theme' and system preference. Brand CSS variables applied in globals.css for both light and dark modes. Framer Motion spring tokens from @quant/brand used throughout SwipeCard (drag gesture), VideoFeed (page transitions), matching.tsx (staggered entrance), discover.tsx (stagger + fade). LoadingSkeleton has video-feed, swipe-card, and match-list variants.
